positive: Mid-century modern graphic design featuring a stylized breakfast scene: a stack of pancakes, a cup of coffee, and a bowl of berries. The artwork uses bold, limited colors (teal, burnt orange, mustard yellow) and clean, geometric lines. Flat illustration style, vector art, suitable for a sticker design.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realistic photo, messy lines
